transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-22]
[00:00] You: Design system review. We've been inconsistent across products and it's slowing teams down.
[00:45] Speaker 1: The token audit is done. We have 340 color tokens, many duplicates. I'll consolidate to a canonical set of 80 tokens and publish the updated token spec by July 31st.
[01:30] Speaker 2: The component library has 47 components but only 30 are documented. I'll write documentation for the remaining 17 components by August 7th.
[02:15] Speaker 3: We also need a migration guide for teams currently using the old components. I'll write the migration guide by August 10th.
[02:50] You: What about the icon set?
[03:05] Speaker 1: The icon set is inconsistent — some are 20px, some 24px. I'll standardize all icons to 24px and rebuild the icon library by August 3rd.
[03:35] Speaker 4: Storybook needs to be updated too. I'll add interactive examples for all 47 components. I'll have the first 25 done by August 5th and all 47 by August 14th.
[04:10] Speaker 2: We should also run an audit of which components are actually being used across products. I'll run the usage analysis script and share the report by July 25th.
[04:45] You: Good idea. Speaker 3, can you set up the design system Slack channel and communication plan?
[05:00] Speaker 3: I'll create the design-system Slack channel and post the adoption roadmap by July 24th.
[05:30] Speaker 4: I'll also set up automated visual regression testing for the component library. I'll have that running in CI by August 12th.
[06:00] You: The design system should be production-ready for all teams by September 1st.

action_items.description: Consolidate color tokens to canonical set of 80 and publish updated token spec
action_items.source_quote: I'll consolidate to a canonical set of 80 tokens and publish the updated token spec by July 31st.

action_items.description: Write documentation for 17 undocumented components in component library
action_items.source_quote: I'll write documentation for the remaining 17 components by August 7th.

action_items.description: Write migration guide for teams transitioning from old components
action_items.source_quote: I'll write the migration guide by August 10th.

action_items.description: Standardize all icons to 24px and rebuild icon library
action_items.source_quote: I'll standardize all icons to 24px and rebuild the icon library by August 3rd.

action_items.description: Add interactive Storybook examples for all 47 components (first 25 by Aug 5, all 47 by Aug 14)
action_items.source_quote: I'll add interactive examples for all 47 components. I'll have the first 25 done by August 5th and all 47 by August 14th.

action_items.description: Run component usage analysis script and share report
action_items.source_quote: I'll run the usage analysis script and share the report by July 25th.

action_items.description: Create design-system Slack channel and post adoption roadmap
action_items.source_quote: I'll create the design-system Slack channel and post the adoption roadmap by July 24th.

action_items.description: Set up automated visual regression testing for component library in CI
action_items.source_quote: I'll set up automated visual regression testing for the component library. I'll have that running in CI by August 12th.

decisions: Design system should be production-ready for all teams by September 1st
